players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: Mariners beat Rangers 5-2 as Bryan Woo set down 15 straight batters and allowed just 2 runs on 4 hits in 7 IP. Raleigh goes 1-3 in the win; he is batting .186 on the year after a slow start to defend his 60-HR 2025 season.

sources.title: Cal Raleigh, Bryan Woo shine in Mariners' win

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: Braves complete a three-game sweep of the Phillies 4-2 on Sunday Night Baseball as Philadelphia loses its 5th straight. Harper is raking individually (.409 wOBA) but grounded into a key out with runners on second and third in the 5th inning.

sources.title: Phillies get swept by Braves to cap off disastrous homestand

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: Nationals blank the Giants 3-0 with Curtis Mead homering and Andrew Alvarez dominant in relief. Arraez goes 0-4 — his first hitless performance in 14 career games at Nationals Park — as San Francisco falls in the rubber match.

sources.title: Curtis Mead homers, Nationals blank Giants 3-0 to avoid sweep

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: Mets extend their skid to 11 games in excruciating fashion, falling 2-1 in 10 innings after Devin Williams blew a 9th-inning save. Bichette goes 0-4 in what has been a rough April for the New York offense.

sources.title: Mets extend losing streak to 11 in excruciating fashion

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: Lindor continues a baffling early-season slump at .175/.287 with just 1 HR and 2 RBI through 80 at-bats. Manager Mendoza has moved him to the bottom of the lineup as the Mets' skid hits 11. No clear injury explanation.

sources.title: Ken Rosenthal not finding answers on Francisco Lindor's bizarre start

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: Cubs complete a sweep of the Mets with a 2-1 walk-off in 10 innings. PCA was placed at second base as the automatic runner, advanced to third on a wild pitch, and scored the winning run on Nico Hoerner's sacrifice fly.

sources.title: Cubs finish sweep of reeling Mets with late rally

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: Padres edge the Angels 2-1 in a pitching duel as Mason Miller closed a combined two-hitter. Merrill goes 0-3 on the day but has 19 hits, 3 HR, and 13 RBI on the 2026 season so far.

players.name: Teoscar Hernández
players.summary: Hernández was given a planned rest day as the Dodgers fell 9-6 to the Rockies at Coors Field. He has been one of LA's hottest hitters, slashing .353 with 3 HR and a 1.042 OPS through 49 at-bats.

sources.title: Dodgers Lineup vs Rockies: Teoscar Hernandez Out, Ryan Ward Making MLB Debut

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: Yankees blank the Royals 7-0 to complete a series sweep, with Aaron Judge hitting his MLB-best 9th homer, Ben Rice going deep, and Trent Grisham crushing a 3-run shot. The Yankees have now won 10 straight regular-season games over Kansas City.

sources.title: Aaron Judge, Ben Rice continue HR barrage, Yankees blank Royals

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: Williams blew a 9th-inning shutout save as Michael Conforto's pinch-hit RBI double tied the game at 1-1, then Nico Hoerner hit a walk-off sacrifice fly off Craig Kimbrel in the 10th. Williams now has a 7.11 ERA in 7 appearances with just 1 save.

sources.title: Devin Williams blows save as Mets lose 11th straight

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: Wheeler made his 5th rehab start for Double-A Reading, allowing 4 ER in 4 innings with his fastball sitting in the low 90s and surrendering 2 homers. Despite the rough outing, the Phillies still expect him to rejoin the rotation around April 24-26 in Atlanta.

sources.title: Zack Wheeler not concerned about decreased velocity before rejoining Phillies

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Ragans had the worst start of his career, issuing a career-high 8 walks and allowing 7 ER in just 4.1 IP as the Yankees swept the Royals 7-0. He falls to 0-4 on the year with his season ERA climbing to 6.0 after a disastrous performance in the Bronx.

sources.title: Yankees sweep Royals — Weathers, Judge lead the way

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: Burns was off today with Brady Singer starting as the Reds beat the Twins 7-4 on a TJ Friedl go-ahead double. Burns has been one of the most dominant starters in baseball early in 2026.

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Eovaldi was off today as MacKenzie Gore started for the Rangers in a 5-2 loss to the Mariners with Bryan Woo delivering 7 stellar innings. Eovaldi recently rebounded with a 7-inning shutout vs. Oakland to improve to 2-2 on the year.

sources.title: Nathan Eovaldi fires seven scoreless innings for Rangers

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Sheehan started on April 18 (5 IP, 2 ER) as the Rockies rallied for a 4-3 win, then the Dodgers fell again April 19, 9-6, with a different starter. Sheehan carries a 6.43 ERA through 3 starts and figures to go again around April 23.

sources.title: Late Rallies Sputter, Leaving Dodgers One Run Short in Loss

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Detmers was superb with 8 strikeouts over 6 innings but took the hard-luck loss as the Angels fell 2-1 to the Padres in a Mason Miller combined two-hitter. His season ERA is now 3.45 — among the best in the AL West.

injuries.name: Zack Wheeler
injuries.note: 5th rehab start for AA Reading Apr 19: 4 IP, 4 ER, 2 HR, velo in low-90s. Expected MLB return Apr 24-26 in Atlanta.

source.title: Zack Wheeler not concerned about decreased velocity before rejoining Phillies
